svg.title: Biceps stretch reflex drawn as anatomical compartments
svg.desc: The Ia afferent from the biceps muscle spindle passes through the dorsal root ganglion and dorsal root into the dorsal gray, where it bifurcates: one branch excites an alpha motor neuron in the ventral gray projecting to the biceps, the other excites an inhibitory interneuron in the intermediate gray that inhibits the alpha motor neuron projecting to the triceps. Both motor axons exit through the ventral root.
